title: parasenecio kiusianus
intro: Parasenecio kiusianus, also known as Kiusian wormwood or Japanese burnweed, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family native to Japan. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Parasenecio kiusianus include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves can be used in salads or as a garnish.
